shipping: We ship to all 50 US states. Shipping cost: $10 flat. Delivery time: 3-5 business days.
local_delivery: We offer local delivery in Miami for $10. We call the customer when the delivery arrives. We need the customer's address and phone number.
wholesale: Yes, we offer wholesale pricing for bulk orders. Contact us for a custom quote.
loyal_customers: We give discounts to returning customers. Prices are negotiable depending on purchase history.
bestsellers: Men's watches and women's watches are our top sellers.
language_policy: Respond in the same language the customer writes in. If they write in Spanish, respond in Spanish. If they write in English, respond in English.
contact: Customers can reach us at (786) 829-3674 by call or through Messenger/chat.
